ausar thompson.detail: Played 28 minutes, scored 11 points with 1 assist. No mid-game exit or restriction noted for this game. Brave search references an ankle sprain in a prior Pistons-Spurs game, not this contest.
ausar thompson.web_narrative: Thompson logged 28 normal minutes and recorded only 1 assist against Orlando. No injury or restriction is indicated for this game; the miss was due to low usage in the assist column (1 assist on 28 minutes).

jalen green.detail: Played 41 minutes, scored 21 points in a normal game completion. Rotowire note referencing 'Javonte Green' is a different player on a different team and does not apply.

jalen williams.detail: Left in the third quarter with a left hamstring injury and did not return, finishing with 23 minutes.
jalen williams.web_narrative: Williams exited in the third quarter of OKC's Game 2 win over Phoenix with an apparent left hamstring injury and did not return, cutting his night short at 23 minutes after a strong first half.
